title: Raccoon Removal in Bellmore, NY | $900 – $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Bellmore, Long Island. Safe, humane wildlife extraction from attics, crawl spaces & yards. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Raccoons are a growing problem in Bellmore, NY, where tree-lined residential streets and accessible attics provide ideal habitats for these clever animals. Our professional raccoon removal services protect Bellmore homes and businesses from property damage, health risks, and ongoing wildlife intrusions. Best Pest Control NYC offers humane, effective raccoon extraction with guaranteed results for Long Island homeowners.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife management experience to Bellmore, with licensed technicians who understand Long Island's unique raccoon behavior patterns. We provide complete removal, exclusion, cleanup, and prevention services with transparent pricing and same-day emergency response throughout Nassau County.
localContext: Bellmore's established neighborhoods near Newbridge Road and the Bellmore LIRR station feature mature trees and older homes with vulnerable entry points that attract raccoons seeking shelter. Properties near Bellmore Creek and local parks like Cedar Creek Park are especially prone to wildlife activity, requiring professional intervention to protect attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Bellmore, NY?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Bellmore typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring repair, and extent of attic damage or contamination. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Bellmore neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Bellmore due to the area's mature trees, accessible food sources, and older homes with attic vulnerabilities. Neighborhoods near Cedar Creek Park and wooded areas see particularly high raccoon activity, especially during spring breeding season and fall when they seek warm shelter.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in Bellmore humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We follow all New York State Department of Environmental Conservation regulations for humane wildlife removal. Our methods prioritize live trapping and relocation when appropriate, along with exclusion techniques that prevent re-entry without harming the animals.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to Bellmore homes?
faqs.answer: Raccoons can cause extensive damage to Bellmore properties, including torn insulation, chewed electrical wiring, destroyed roof vents, contaminated attics with feces and urine, and structural damage to soffits and fascia boards. They also pose health risks through parasites and diseases like rabies and raccoon roundworm.
